<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace DI\Definition; /** * Definition of an array containing values or references. * * @since 5.0 * @author Matthieu Napoli <matthieu@mnapoli.fr> */ class ArrayDefinition implements Definition { /** Entry name. */ private string $name = ''; public function __construct( private array $values, ) { } public function getName() : string { return $this->name; } public function setName(string $name) : void { $this->name = $name; } public function getValues() : array { return $this->values; } public function replaceNestedDefinitions(callable $replacer) : void { $this->values = array_map($replacer, $this->values); } public function __toString() : string { $str = '[' . \PHP_EOL; foreach ($this->values as $key => $value) { if (is_string($key)) { $key = "'" . $key . "'"; } $str .= ' ' . $key . ' => '; if ($value instanceof Definition) { $str .= str_replace(\PHP_EOL, \PHP_EOL . ' ', (string) $value); } else { $str .= var_export($value, true); } $str .= ',' . \PHP_EOL; } return $str . ']'; } }
